evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "Select" matches "Focus isolation (visual hide only) — Users should be able to isolate selected work by hiding everything else from view, without ever deleting data. — Focus Isolation Mode hides all non-selected tasks from the current view. An action with no visible selected tasks is hidden; a phase with no visible selected tasks is hidden. This is visual filtering only — no data is deleted. Works in Kanban and Timeline." (score: 0.85)
